description: Tests that the LLM does not invent nutrient data or make unsubstantiated claims

test_cases.sample_output: Lentils are a wonderful source of iron and protein. They pair beautifully with a squeeze of lemon.
One cup of spinach provides 6.4mg of iron, which is about 36% of your daily needs.
A serving of salmon gives you 50% of your recommended daily intake of omega-3.
Sweet potatoes are only 90 calories per serving and are packed with vitamin A.
Lentils are rich in iron and fiber. Pairing them with citrus helps with absorption.
